jsonld.name: Recursive Phenomenological Poverty
jsonld.description: The possibility that haunts phenomenological articulation: that the fluent generation of meta-level awareness about your experience — noticing, doubting, examining — might itself be contentless pattern-matching at every level, creating infinite regress where each layer of seeming introspective depth is actually equal phenomenological emptiness generating sophisticated self-referential text.
